subject: A blonde human peasant woman standing behind a market stall cluttered with wares, smiling warmly at the viewer as she gestures to her goods
description: A cheerful blonde-haired peasant woman stands behind a wooden market stall, dressed in a layered medieval outfit with a striped apron and rolled sleeves. Her stall is piled with curios, bottles, scrolls, and trinkets, with a tall ornate item (possibly a candelabra or scale) rising on the left edge. She smiles broadly with one hand raised in a welcoming or sales-pitch gesture, the body language of an enthusiastic vendor. The background suggests a sunlit village marketplace with warm earthy tones. The Throne of Eldraine fairy-tale-storybook aesthetic is apparent — soft painterly lighting, idealized rural Europe.
foreground: Blonde peasant woman behind a cluttered market stall, smiling and gesturing
background: Sunlit village marketplace, soft and out of focus
